title: helianthus nebrascensis
intro: Helianthus nebrascensis, also known as the Rocky Mountain sunflower, is a perennial plant native to the dry plains and hills of the western United States. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as supporting immune function. Helianthus nebrascensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical application, and is often used to treat skin issues and wounds.
